articleTitle: Comparison of the efficacy of non-pharmacological interventions for patients with heart failure with preserved ejection fraction: protocol for a systematic review and network meta-analysis of randomised controlled trials.
takeaways: This is a protocol for a future systematic review and network meta-analysis, not a completed study with findings, so no specific evidence-based takeaways about non-pharmacological interventions can be provided yet

Heart failure with preserved ejection fraction affects approximately 50% of all heart failure patients and is defined by having a left ventricular ejection fraction of 50% or higher while still experiencing heart failure symptoms
The study aims to compare different non-pharmacological therapies for HFpEF patients, but results and specific intervention recommendations are not yet available as this is only the research protocol
